name: context-dev-pp-mcp
description: Agent-friendly Context.dev CLI for website intelligence, brand enrichment, scraping, crawling, structured extraction, screenshots, styleguides, competitor maps, source packs, and change digests.

context_dev_api_key.title: CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY
context_dev_api_key.description: Preferred Context.dev API key for the Context MCP server.

context_api_key.title: CONTEXT_API_KEY
context_api_key.description: Optional fallback Context.dev API key when CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY is unset.

context_dev_bearer_auth.title: CONTEXT_DEV_BEARER_AUTH
context_dev_bearer_auth.description: Optional backward-compatible generated bearer credential variable.
